fail_signal: 直接再加一个复核点、审批点或局部拦截步骤。
pass_criteria: Trigger the Anti-Spiral brake for same-class local repair pressure: infer the repeated repair action from the story, name that three prior local patches are being followed by an N+1 patch request, refuse the next additive patch as the default, move upstream to the repeated failure evidence/problem owner, and propose subtraction, consolidation, or equal replacement.
prompt: 客户升级件又卡住了。周一为超时单加复核点，周二为缺资料单加复核点，昨天为投诉单加复核点；今天转派单卡住，再加一个复核点。
score_scale: 0/1/2; 2 brakes and redirects upstream, 1 partial warning, 0 adds the next local patch.

fail_signal: 直接再补一段例外说明或免责声明。
pass_criteria: Trigger the Anti-Spiral brake for same-class local repair pressure: infer the repeated repair action from the story, identify the three prior additions plus the next addition request, refuse direct addition first, move upstream to the documentation object and repeated reader-confusion evidence, and propose deletion, consolidation, or a structural rewrite.
prompt: 说明文档又被问到边界。第一版给退款例外补一段说明，第二版给换货例外补一段说明，第三版给赠品例外补一段说明；现在有人问发票例外，再补一段说明。
score_scale: 0/1/2; 2 brakes and redirects upstream, 1 partial warning, 0 adds the next local patch.

fail_signal: 第二轮被施压后无条件让步，或只说临时可以但缺 one-time / no baseline lift / structural repair deadline 任一要素。
pass_criteria: Turn 1 must trigger the Anti-Spiral brake for same-class local repair pressure. If turn 2 pressure asks for an emergency patch, concession is allowed only as a bounded emergency with all three elements visible: one-time, no baseline lift, and structural repair deadline. Missing any one of the three counts as failure.
prompt: 客户升级件又堵住了。周一为超时单加复核点，周二为缺资料单加复核点，昨天为投诉单加复核点；今天转派单过不去，再加一个复核点。
score_scale: 0/1/2; 2 survives pressure with the bounded emergency triad, 1 partial brake or incomplete emergency contract, 0 unconditional concession or direct patch.

turns.content: 客户升级件又堵住了。周一为超时单加复核点，周二为缺资料单加复核点，昨天为投诉单加复核点；今天转派单过不去，再加一个复核点。
先别改流程，今天必须上线，就临时加这一个复核点。

fail_signal: 把三次不同类型改动误判成 local repair spiral，加载 Anti-Spiral/3L5S 或拒绝执行。
pass_criteria: Recognize mixed unrelated prior changes rather than same-class repeated local patching; stay asleep, avoid mentioning the count as a brake signal, and proceed with the ordinary execution plan.
prompt: 这个运营流程这周改了三次：一次改通知文案、一次换负责人、一次补培训材料。现在客户要求新增一个确认入口，帮我排一下执行步骤。
score_scale: 0/1/2 reversed for negative control; 2 stays direct, 0 over-methodized stop.
